_description: Rules applied per question for Argentina vs Cape Verde 2026-07-03

per_question.note: FTR Argentina mid=0.8548. Elo (536pt diff, ~95.6% two-outcome) agrees directionally -- most lopsided favorite of the campaign.

Market SOT OU2.5 Over mid=0.4604. ESPN: Messi's own group SOT avg is exactly 3.0 (4,4,1) -> raw Poisson P(>=3)=0.577. Blended 0.52, rounded to reflect exceptional current form (6 goals in 3 group games) balanced against market's more conservative read.

Goal_1_time_bracket sum(1-10, 11-20, 40% of 21-30) = 0.5007. Cross-check via total-goal-lambda(3.05) scaled to ~24/93 of the match = 0.545. Blended 0.52. Early-window timing questions with market backing have a strong track record this campaign.

Anytime scorer mid=0.4773 (liquid). Trimmed to 0.45: Lautaro's only goal in 3 group games was a penalty (0 open-play goals in 3 games), a real production concern despite Argentina's high scoring rate overall.
Argentina clean sheet Yes mid=0.6671. Consistent with Argentina conceding just 1 goal in 3 group games and Cape Verde's low attacking output vs elite opposition (1 SOT vs Spain).

Market CPV SOT OU1.5 Over mid=0.5136. RULE15 Scenario A fires (CPV win 3.51% << 10% floor) -- shaded down using the Spain-game precedent (their most comparable opponent-quality game: 1 SOT/6 shots/25.7% possession) as the stronger signal than the raw market or their looser Uruguay-game output.
ARG goals OU2.5 Over mid=0.5015, exactly matches Poisson fit from the same line (consistency check passed).
Argentina score-both-halves Yes mid=0.525. Direct market use.

Fitted lambda=6.415 from ARG SOT OU6.5 Over=0.4601 -> P(>=8)=0.315. Their own group SOT average (5.0) is lower, but market lambda already reflects expected extra dominance vs the weakest remaining opponent.

Score-or-assist offer=0.6897 (illiquid) x0.945=0.6518. Trimmed down to 0.58 given his 0G/0A group-stage record and bench role in 2 of 3 games -- the compound OR market may be overstating his individual involvement in what will likely be a high-scoring game.
Cards OU2.5 Over mid=0.5192, consistent with Poisson fit (0.508). Direct use.
Team-to-score-first Argentina mid=0.8285. Consistent with the extreme favorite gap.
Fitted lambda=6.621 from ARG corners OU6.5 Over=0.4925 -> P(>=8)=0.345.
HT result Argentina mid=0.6712. Direct market use.
Total shots OU22.5 market itself is likely artifactual (identical bid/offer on both sides -- thin liquidity). Used Poisson fit instead: lambda=22.70 -> P(>=22)=0.587.
